sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92936" key="r(wpa/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥωπ-άς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥώψ</foreign> (A), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:393" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.393</biblScope> </bibl>; so <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῶπαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
